title: Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: Comprehensive analyst forecast and price targets for VKTX stock. Based on short-term price targets from 14 analysts, the average price target for Viking Therapeutics is $99.57, with forecasts ranging from a low of $38.00 to a high of $164.00. Other sources show slightly different averages with projections from 18 analysts indicating an average 12-month price target of $92.72 USD, with a high estimate of $125 USD and a low estimate of $35 USD. The 10 analysts covering VKTX stock have a consensus rating of Strong Buy and an average price target of $88, forecasting a 171.69% increase in the stock price. Of the 16 recommendations, 15 are Strong Buy, representing 93.75% of all recommendations. VKTX has 164.20% upside potential based on analysts' average price target. Analysts remain quite bullish on VKTX stock, with strong buy consensus and substantial upside potential.
